app.title: Tintpath
app.tagline: Turn any photo into a paint-by-numbers template — right in your browser.
app.privacy: 100% client-side. Your images never leave this device.

upload.formats: JPG, PNG or WEBP · up to 4000×4000 px
upload.errorFormat: Please use a JPG, PNG or WEBP image.
upload.errorLoad: The image could not be loaded.
upload.confirmLarge: This file is larger than 50 MB and may be slow to process. Load it anyway?
upload.resumeTitle: Pick up where you left off?
upload.sample: No photo handy? Try the sample image

crop.title: Crop your image and pick a paper size
crop.hint: Drag the frame to move it, drag a corner to resize. The aspect ratio follows the paper size.

detail.title: Choose the level of detail
detail.minRegionHint: Smaller regions are merged into the most similar neighbor.
detail.smoothingHint: How strongly the traced outlines are simplified.
detail.customPaletteHint: Match the paints you own — the color slider is ignored.

outline.title: Inspect the outlines
outline.canvasLabel: Outline drawing with numbered regions. Use the zoom buttons to inspect details.

colors.title: Adjust the palette
colors.hint: Click a swatch to swap a single color, or apply a preset to the whole palette.

export.title: Export your template
export.dxfHint: For laser software without SVG support
export.svgNumbersHint: Added as text elements — convert to paths in your laser software if needed.

imprint.title: Imprint
imprint.contactBody:
[Your name]
[Street and number]
[Postal code, city]
[Country]
Email: [your@email.example]

Replace this placeholder with your details before publishing the site.
imprint.privacyBody:
Tintpath runs entirely in your browser. Images are processed locally and are never uploaded to a server.

UI preferences and — if you use it — the resume feature store data only on this device (localStorage / IndexedDB). Use “Start over” or “Discard” to delete it at any time.

The star counter in the header queries the public GitHub API; no personal data is transmitted.
imprint.disclaimerBody: This is a free, open-source tool provided “as is”, without warranty of any kind. External links lead to third-party content for which the respective operators are responsible.

errors.pipeline: Processing failed. Try a smaller image or fewer colors.
errors.lowContrast: The image has very little contrast — try fewer colors.

footer.noUploads: No uploads, no accounts, no tracking

common.zoomHint: Scroll to zoom · drag to pan · double-click to toggle
